title: Mace Variants
description: RPG variants of the mace with unique special effects and abilities
body:
**DESCRIPTION** The Mace is new weapon introduced in version 1.21
Your vanilla experience will now be further enhanced thanks to the ability to craft variants of the mace item. See below for information on what you can craft. More variants may be added at a later date. **Diamond Mace** * Enchants: Density II * Durability: 2800 * Special Effects: Increased movement speed while in main hand * Attack Damage: 6 * Attack Speed: 0.6   **Flame Mace** * Enchants: Fire Aspect II,  Smite I * Durability:2000 * Attack Damage: 6 * Attack Speed: 0.6   **Wind Sword** * Enchants: Wind Burst II,  Sharpness I * Durability: 1700 * Attack Damage: 12 * Attack Speed: 1.6   * Texture by Amadeus * Note: This item is technically stil a mace so use mace based enchants
You can craft a vanilla mace using any of the following recipes:   Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off! [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1068/671/53840b7f-f250-4a97-8995-c3544ae3e296.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/gamerpotion)
